title: zingiber neesanum
intro: Zingiber neesanum, also known as the Himalayan ginger or Kerala ginger, is a type of plant belonging to the Zingiberaceae family, native to the Western Ghats region of India. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it a valuable ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Zingiber neesanum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
